battleLength.description: Battle ends after five battle rounds or immediately when a victory condition is met.

primary.label: Control more objectives than your opponent at end of round

terrainTraits.name: Volcanic scree
terrainTraits.effect: Treat vertical distance up across this terrain feature as double.

terrainTraits.name: Arcane nexus
terrainTraits.effect: The first spell cast by each player within 6" of this terrain uses one less casting roll modifier step (minimum unmodified).

terrainTraits.name: Dead marsh
terrainTraits.effect: Units never count as receiving cover saves from this terrain; worsened save rolls apply instead.
